Transcrição Completa: Day 25 - Brandon Beaver Prop Strategy

 

[00:00]"What kind of prop like Brandon Beaver here? How would I use him in a video?"

 

[00:03]"Hey, what's going on, Bob? So, you can meet my friend Brandon Beaver here."

 

[00:08]"Um, this might seem a little weird, and I don't think it is at all because Brandon Beaver and I were actually just sitting with one of my kids, and we were thinking, dude, why'd you start a business?"

 

[00:18]"Do you have do you have kids? And um you know if you do, do you run your business just to run your business and for it to run you or do you run your business so you can you know have Brandon Beaver here spend time with your kids and you know you can enjoy that quality time that we all desire."

 

[00:38]"I mean I'm a parent you know I get it. Um I understand and I want you to by the way I'm not a parent."

 

[00:45]"I want you to understand that in real time everybody's running a business in order to live in abundance and provide for our kids and you know let them meet Branding Branding Beaver here rather than uh you know the cold hard streets and us not being able to provide for them and us not being able to give them good education and things like that."

 

[01:06]"So I don't know why you started business but I started business because I ethically believe in what I do and I have a conviction on the fact that I saw opportunity in what I can do for your business and I want to talk to you."

 

[01:19]"So does Brandon Beaver here and uh you know hopefully you want to provide for you and your family and your entire family of employees and staff as much as I want to do for mine and as much as I want to put the trophy of Bob and his company on the shelf and get you guys some results."

 

[01:35]"Can we talk? What do you think today? Right now are you available or are you good sometime tomorrow in the afternoon?"

 

[01:42]"Let me know and I'll talk soon. Just like that."

 

[01:45]"Parents, you're using all your kids now. You're making money on it. All those toys, all those Christmas presents. Go cash out."

 

[01:53]"Go hit your hundred. And more importantly, go get your numbers up. Keep disciplined."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Day 25 de uma sequência de treinamento

Meta mencionada: "hit your hundred"

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Uso de Props Físicos: Utilização de brinquedos/objetos (Brandon Beaver) como elemento de conexão emocional

Storytelling Parental: Conectar necessidades de negócio com motivações familiares

Gatilho Emocional: Contraste entre "qualidade de vida familiar" vs "cold hard streets"

Call-to-Action Duplo: Oferecer opções de horário (hoje/amanhã tarde)

Reaproveitamento de Recursos: Usar brinquedos das crianças como props em vídeos de prospecção

 

ESTRUTURA:

Framework de Abordagem:

Apresentação do prop de forma lúdica

Conexão emocional (família/filhos)

Questionamento sobre propósito do negócio

Apresentação de convicção pessoal

Call-to-action com opções

Encerramento motivacional para o time

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não especificados diretamente

Foco em "abundância" e "provisão familiar"

Conceito de "fazer dinheiro" com recursos já disponíveis (brinquedos)

 

CONTEXTO ADICIONAL:

Tom: Casual, pessoal, emocional

Público-Alvo: Empreendedores/donos de negócio chamados "Bob"

Técnica: Uso de contraste emocional (família feliz vs dificuldades financeiras)

Objetivo: Agendar conversa de vendas usando conexão emocional

 

DURAÇÃO: ~2 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo de prospecção/cold outreach com elemento visual (prop)
